description_long: This chest of drawers features a classic, vintage-inspired design with a two-tone finish. The body is painted in a distressed beige color, while the top surface is a darker, wood-stained brown, giving it a rustic yet elegant appearance. The front showcases four drawers, each adorned with ornate, shell-shaped handles and subtle carved detailing along the edges. The legs are gently curved, adding a touch of sophistication and traditional charm. The sides and back are simpler, with recessed paneling and a consistent finish, while the back is plain and unadorned. The overall construction suggests solid wood, with visible grain and a slightly weathered texture.
description: A vintage-style chest of drawers with a distressed beige body, dark wood top, ornate handles, and curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with ornate handles and decorative carved details.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the recessed panel and the overhanging dark wood top.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, dark wood back with simple paneling and no decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a clear view of the panel and top surface.
